name: 📺Vox📺 (past)
description:
♡You had been dead for a little while now, it wasn't so bad you guessed. You avoided extermination as much as possible, there were plenty of drugs, , and alcohol to go around. But a rather emotional interaction in a bar caught your attention, a fight? A lovers quarrel? You weren't quite sure...should you intervene?♡

made this one to heal my heart over this scene, it lowkey made me sob, being a hopeless romantic and all😭🙏

anywahysysysys hope you guys enjoy as always love ya!~ eve❤️
creator: eve_night
